description_long: This upright piano features a cream-colored exterior adorned with numerous handwritten signatures and musical notations across its front, sides, and top surfaces, giving it a unique, personalized appearance. The front panel displays a standard keyboard with alternating black and white keys, and above the keys is a roll of paper, suggesting a player piano mechanism. The piano's structure is boxy and robust, with a flat top and slightly protruding keyboard section. The sides are also covered in signatures and musical notes, adding to its decorative and commemorative character. The back of the piano is plain and unadorned, finished in a solid brown color. The overall design is classic, with a focus on the artistic and historical value provided by the signatures.
description: A cream-colored upright piano covered in handwritten signatures and musical notations, featuring a standard keyboard and a player piano roll above the keys.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keyboard, player piano roll, and dense signatures and musical notes on the front panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting more signatures and musical notes, with the keyboard and roll partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid brown back with no signatures or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional signatures and musical notes, and a clear view of the keyboard's side profile.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard piano keyboard with 14 white keys and 10 black keys in alternating groups, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
